query: ok I'm done for the day, been working on the payment integration for the last 3 hours. made good progress on the stripe webhook handler in src/webhooks/stripe.ts but still need to wire up the frontend. save my state somehow

I need to stop here and pick this up tomorrow morning. We got the auth middleware refactored but the tests are still failing on the session rotation edge case. Can you write down where we are so I don't lose context?
this context window is getting really long and I feel like you're starting to lose track of things. can you compress what we've done so far before we keep going?
Continue from where I left off. I was working on the notifications feature yesterday.
I'm switching gears — was working on the API but now need to fix a CSS bug in the navbar. Save what we have on the API work before we context-switch

wrapping up for tonight. deployed the staging build, fixed the CORS issue in apps/server/src/app.ts, but the websocket reconnection logic in packages/realtime/src/client.ts still drops messages after 30s idle. checkpoint this
hey I just opened a new session. is there anything from a previous session I should know about before I start working?

gotta run to a meeting, save progress on the dashboard migration — we moved 3 of 5 widgets to the new chart library but the sparkline component in components/charts/sparkline.tsx still uses the old recharts API

alright let's call it here. been debugging this memory leak for 2 hours and I think the issue is in the connection pool but I can't reproduce it locally. save everything so someone else can pick it up
before you forget everything — write down what we decided about the database schema and why we went with JSON columns instead of separate tables
I need to refactor how we handle context in the React app — the useContext provider in src/providers/AppContext.tsx is getting unwieldy and I want to split it into separate providers
can you add error handling to the createUser function in src/services/user.ts? it's throwing unhandled promise rejections when the email is already taken
write me a bash script that monitors disk usage and sends a slack notification when it goes above 80%
the CI pipeline is failing on the lint step — looks like prettier and eslint are disagreeing about trailing commas in packages/trpc/src/routers/user.ts. can you fix the config?
I want to add session management to our express app — like login/logout with JWT tokens and refresh token rotation. the auth routes should go in apps/server/src/routes/auth.ts
review this pull request and tell me if there are any issues — it adds a new REST endpoint for bulk user imports with CSV parsing
help me set up a docker-compose file for local development with postgres, redis, and the node server. I want hot reload working too
what's the best way to handle file uploads in Next.js 14? I need to let users upload profile pictures up to 5MB and store them in S3
can you explain how the tRPC context is set up in this project? I'm trying to understand how the session gets passed from the auth middleware to the procedures
I need to write integration tests for the checkout flow — the test should create a cart, add items, apply a coupon, and verify the total. use vitest and the test helpers in tests/utils/
